title: Communicate Hint Star Penalty Before Click
description: Display 'Using hints reduces max ★' next to hint button before clicking. Show '⚠ Max ★★ with hints' after use.

changes.what: updateHintPenalty() already shows pre-hint warning ('💡 Hints available (may reduce ★)') and post-hint penalty. Current implementation already satisfies the requirement. Just need to refine the messaging: before click show 'Using hints reduces max ★' instead of current text, and ensure post-use shows '⚠ Max ★★ with hints' or '⚠ Max ★ with hints'.

acceptance: Before any hint click: hint penalty area shows 'Using hints reduces max ★'
After first hint: no penalty message (first hint is free per setupHintAndSkip)
After second hint: shows '⚠ Max ★★ with hints'
After third hint: shows '⚠ Max ★ with hints'
